subject: Revised Proposal - Website Redesign
body:
Hi Arjun,

Thank you for the meeting yesterday. Please find the revised proposal attached with the updated pricing.

Looking forward to your feedback.

Best regards,
Ahmad

subject: Follow-up: E-commerce Platform Discussion
body:
Dear Meera,

Just following up on our conversation about the e-commerce platform. Would you be available for a call this week to discuss the Shopify integration options?

Please let me know your availability.

Warm regards,
Ahmad

subject: Introduction - Member Management Solutions
body:
Hello Karan,

It was great speaking with you today. As discussed, we specialize in building custom member management apps with seamless payment integration.

I'd love to schedule a demo at your convenience.

Best,
Ahmad
